<think> Both Babes in Toyland and One of Our Dinosaurs Is Missing are old children's films. Babes in Toyland is a 1961 musical fantasy film based on the opera "Hansel and Gretel." <answer> The film "Babes in Toyland" was produced first, in 1961.
